title: Light Romantic Brazilian Ginger Stir-fry
description: A light and romantic dish featuring floral notes from ground ginger, cooked at low temperatures to ensure a tender texture and low-calorie-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Fold in ground ginger and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
Stir in chicken pieces and soy sauce; cover and simmer for approximately 5 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
Toss in cherry tomatoes and continue cooking for about 2 minutes more.
Add mixed greens on top of the stir-fry just before serving to keep them fresh and bright, stirring gently not to break them apart.
